heading: Omitted
label: 86 to 88 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 86 to 88, , §§ 1–3, , related to conservation of domestic sources of tin, and were superseded by the Export Control Act of 1949 (former sections 2021 to 2032 of the former Appendix to this title) pursuant to section 10 of that Act (former section 2030 of the former Appendix to this title). The act of was subsequently superseded by the Export Administration Act of 1969 (former sections 2401 to 2413 of the former Appendix to this title) pursuant to section 12 of that Act (former section 2411 of the former Appendix to this title). See, also, the Export Control Reform Act of 2018, which is classified principally to chapter 58 (§ 4801 et seq.) of this title.act Feb. 15, 1936, ch. 7449 Stat. 1140Feb. 15, 1936Section 86, , , related to conservation of domestic resources of tin.act Feb. 15, 1936, ch. 74, § 149 Stat. 1140Section 87, , , related to prohibition of exportation except on license.act Feb. 15, 1936, ch. 74, § 249 Stat. 1140Section 88, , , related to penalties for violations of sections 86 and 87 of this title.act Feb. 15, 1936, ch. 74, § 349 Stat. 1140
